query:
-- 1. Totais gerais
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_ativos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_outliers,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_limpos,
  ROUND(AVG(scoreMatch), 3) as score_medio,
  MIN(scoreMatch) as score_min,
  MAX(scoreMatch) as score_max
FROM spread_analysis;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_ativos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_outliers,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_limpos,
  ROUND(AVG(scoreMatch), 3) as score_medio,
  MIN(scoreMatch) as score_min,
  MAX(scoreMatch) as score_max
FROM spread_analysis;
